Operation 'forwardGeocode' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is generic. Description lacks details about optional modules, return structure, and what data is included in the response. Added specifics about supported modules and return format to improve AI agent understanding of available options and expected output.

data.current_description: Convert a free-text address, place name, or postal code to location data including latitude and longitude coordinates.
data.summary_suggestion: Convert address or place name to coordinates
data.description_suggestion: Converts a free-text address, place name, or postal code to geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) and detailed location data. Supports optional data modules for timezone, sun/astrology, country information, and bounding box data. Returns a LocationResult object containing the matched location with coordinates and optional enriched data based on enabled modules.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic. Description lacks details about optional modules, return structure, and what data is included in the response. Added specifics about supported modules and return format to improve AI agent understanding of available options and expected output.

message: Operation 'batchForwardGeocode' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description mentions plan requirement but lacks input/output details. Added clarity about BatchRequest structure, array-based processing, and that each query can have independent module options. Helps AI agents understand batch operation mechanics and plan constraints.

data.current_description: Process multiple forward geocoding queries in a single request. Requires Professional Plan or higher.
data.summary_suggestion: Geocode multiple addresses in one request
data.description_suggestion: Processes multiple forward geocoding queries in a single request, converting addresses, place names, or postal codes to coordinates and location data. Requires Professional Plan or higher subscription. Accepts a BatchRequest containing an array of queries. Returns an array of LocationResult objects corresponding to each input query, with optional enriched data modules available per query.
data.reasoning: Original description mentions plan requirement but lacks input/output details. Added clarity about BatchRequest structure, array-based processing, and that each query can have independent module options. Helps AI agents understand batch operation mechanics and plan constraints.

data.current_description: Convert coordinates (latitude and longitude) or an IP address to location data.
data.summary_suggestion: Convert coordinates or IP address to location
data.description_suggestion: Converts geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) or an IP address to detailed location data including address, place name, and administrative divisions. Supports optional data modules for timezone, sun/astrology, country information, and bounding box data. Returns a LocationResult object containing the matched location with optional enriched data based on enabled modules.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic. Description lacks details about optional modules, return structure, and what enriched data is available. Added specifics about supported modules, return format, and types of location data returned to improve AI agent understanding of capabilities and expected output.

data.current_description: Process multiple reverse geocoding queries in a single request. Requires Professional Plan or higher.
data.summary_suggestion: Reverse geocode multiple coordinates in one request
data.description_suggestion: Processes multiple reverse geocoding queries in a single request, converting coordinates or IP addresses to location data.
